title: Microblocks
description: Adds microblocks to the game which can be placed in any block
body:
Adds microblocks to the game which can be placed in any block space  
![Microblocks in world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c5777556203d3407ada9b9f2004b2a4cf0a1d6a.webp)

These microblocks can be crafted using the saw, you can cut down any supported block into a slab, then cute those slabs into slab strips and panels and so on.
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ede8462c82ea7f50be55b4c00be0d40584612c0f.png)

---
A big thanks goes to ChickenBones and Eloraam for inspiring us with their respective microblock implementations
